TEXT.citation: Rau, D. V., & Dong, M. N. (2006). Yami texts with reference grammar and dictionary. Institute of Linguistics, Academia Sinica.
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @book{rau2006yami, title={Yami texts with reference grammar and dictionary}, author={Rau, D Victoria and Dong, Maa-Neu}, year={2006}, publisher={Institute of Linguistics, Academia Sinica}}
TEXT.source: ['9. podpoden o ngepen ni Akay', '幫祖父拔牙齒', 'Helping Grandpa pull his tooth', '', 'si apen Ogaog (M, 69, Iranmilek)', '黃馬期，男，69，東清村', '']

S.FORM: mi-key-ke-ian namen si ka-kteh ito si apen Tagaan ito am.
S.PHON: mi-kəj-kə-ian namən ʂi ka-ktəʁ ito~u ʂi apən tagaan ito~u am.
S.FORM: mikeykeian namen si kakteh ito si apen Tagaan ito am.
S.PHON: mikəjkəian namən ɕi kaktəɰ ito~u ɕi apən tagaan ito~u am.
S.TRANSL: 有一天，我和我的好兄弟si apen Tagaan待在村中裡一起作伴玩耍
One day, my brother si apen Tagaan and I were playing around.

S.FORM: ma-níring jiaken si akay icialaw, ta ingn-en na o ngepen na ma-gona-gonay,
S.PHON: ma-n*riŋ ʥiakən ʂi akaj icialaw, ta iŋn-ən na o~u ŋəpən na ma-go~una-go~unaj,
S.FORM: maniring jiaken si akay icialaw, ta ingnen na o ngepen na magonagonay,
S.PHON: maniɻiŋ ʥiakən ɕi akaj iʨialaw, ta iŋnən na o~u ŋəpən na mago~unago~unaj,
S.TRANSL: 祖父牙齒動搖，感覺得很痛，祖父就對我說
Grandpa talked to me because his tooth was moving and it hurt.

S.FORM: ta no k-om-an am, ji máka-ka-kan, akma-an jiaken i sio a ji a-bsoy i sio.
S.PHON: ta no~u k-o~um-an am, ʥi m*ka-ka-kan, akma-an ʥiakən i ʂio~u a ʥi a-bʂo~uj i ʂio~u.
S.FORM: ta no koman am, ji makakakan, akmaan jiaken i sio a ji absoy i sio.
S.PHON: ta no~u ko~uman am, ʥi makakakan, akmaan ʥiakən i ɕio~u a ʥi abʂo~uj i ɕio~u.
S.TRANSL: 吃飯的時候，因為沒辦法好好的吃，就像我以前的情形一樣，因為牙痛沒辦法吃飽
He couldn't chew when he ate. Just like me before, he was never full.

S.FORM: i-ka-ráhet na do ka-langa-langay na am,
S.PHON: i-ka-r*ʁət na ɖo~u ka-laŋa-laŋaj na am,
S.FORM: ikarahet na do kalangalangay na am,
S.PHON: ikaɻaɰət na ɖo~u kalaŋalaŋaj na am,
S.TRANSL: （吃飯的時候）臉部時常要往上仰，令他感到困擾不已
Whenever (he ate), he faced upwards, but the action made him feel bad.

S.FORM: ma-níring jiaken am, yamen si apen Tagaan ito,
S.PHON: ma-n*riŋ ʥiakən am, jamən ʂi apən tagaan ito~u,
S.FORM: maniring jiaken am, yamen si apen Tagaan ito,
S.PHON: maniɻiŋ ʥiakən am, jamən ɕi apən tagaan ito~u,
S.TRANSL: 當時只有si apen Tagaan和我在場，祖父對我說，
At the time only si apen Tagaan and I were there, and Grandpa told me,

S.FORM: "mo Sazovaz," koan na yaken, "ikongo?"
S.PHON: "mo~u ʂaʐo~uvaʐ," ko~uan na jakən, "iko~uŋo~u?"
S.FORM: "mo Sazovaz," koan na yaken, "ikongo?"
S.PHON: "mo~u ʂaɻo~ufaɻ," ko~uan na jakən, "iko~uŋo~u?"
S.TRANSL: 他說＂Sazovaz！＂ 我說＂什麼事？＂
"Sazovaz!" "Yes, Grandpa?" I said.

S.FORM: "a ma-kteb ko, ji mo nge-ngn-an?"
S.PHON: "a ma-ktəb ko~u, ʥi mo~u ŋə-ŋn-an?"
S.FORM: "a makteb ko, ji mo ngengnan?"
S.PHON: "a maktəb ko~u, ʥi mo~u ŋəŋnan?"
S.TRANSL: ＂我哪有辦法弄斷你的牙齒？而且你會痛啊＂
"How can I break your tooth? It will hurt!"

S.FORM: "ciaha, ta ya ji a-tey-láhet manga apo ko a", "nohon".
S.PHON: "ciaʁa, ta ja ʥi a-təj-l*ʁət maŋa apo~u ko~u a", "no~uʁo~un".
S.FORM: "ciaha, ta ya ji ateylahet manga apo ko a", "nohon".
S.PHON: "ʨiaɰa, ta ja ʥi atəjlaɰət maŋa apo~u ko~u a", "no~uɰo~un".
S.TRANSL: ＂沒關係，受夠了＂ ，＂好吧＂
"It's okay, I can't bear it any longer." "Okay."

S.FORM: ni-ma-kteb a ke-kezdas am ori o ni-ha-hap ko ori a, ka-pangap ko so pa-patok
S.PHON: ni-ma-ktəb a kə-kəʐɖaʂ am o~uri o~u ni-ʁa-ʁap ko~u o~uri a, ka-paŋap ko~u ʂo~u pa-pato~uk
S.FORM: nimakteb a kekezdas am ori o nihahap ko ori a, kapangap ko so papatok
S.PHON: nimaktəb a kəkəɻɖaʂ am o~uɻi o~u niɰaɰap ko~u o~uɻi a, kapaŋap ko~u ʂo~u papato~uk
S.TRANSL: 我撿了一支斷掉的鐮刀，還有一個鎚子
I picked up a broken sickle and a hammer.

S.FORM: ratateng am, "ori o ya om-lang-langay, mo apo ko"
S.PHON: ratatəŋ am, "o~uri o~u ja o~um-laŋ-laŋaj, mo~u apo~u ko~u"
S.FORM: ratateng am, "ori o ya omlanglangay, mo apo ko"
S.PHON: ɻatatəŋ am, "o~uɻi o~u ja o~umlaŋlaŋaj, mo~u apo~u ko~u"
S.TRANSL: ＂孫子，你看會往上動搖的那個就是了＂
"Grandson, the one that is shaking upwards is the one."

S.FORM: pa-angn-an ko so mao ori a, "key!" to ko patok-a ori am, "nga! mo ka-zisaw, ayayay, ayayaya..".
S.PHON: pa-aŋn-an ko~u ʂo~u mao~u o~uri a, "kəj!" to~u ko~u pato~uk-a o~uri am, "ŋa! mo~u ka-ʐiʂaw, ajajaj, ajajaja..".
S.FORM: paangnan ko so mao ori a, "key!" to ko patoka ori am, "nga! mo kazisaw, ayayay, ayayaya..".
S.PHON: paaŋnan ko~u ʂo~u mao~u o~uɻi a, "kəj!" to~u ko~u pato~uka o~uɻi am, "ŋa! mo~u kaɻiʂaw, ajajaj, ajajaja..".
S.TRANSL: 我把石頭擺在（搖動的牙齒）下面。他說＂快呀！＂ 我就鎚了一下，＂喔，好痛啊，你要死啦，啊呀呀，啊呀呀呀＂
I placed a stone underneath the tooth, and he said, "Quick!" I hammered, and he started screaming, "Shit! Ow, that hurts! Ahhhhhhh, Owwww!"

S.FORM: "ciana, mo Akay an?" "cítey pala, manga apo ko"
S.PHON: "ciana, mo~u akaj an?" "c*təj pala, maŋa apo~u ko~u"
S.FORM: "ciana, mo Akay an?" "citey pala, manga apo ko"
S.PHON: "ʨiana, mo~u akaj an?" "ʨitəj pala, maŋa apo~u ko~u"
S.TRANSL: ＂那就算了吧，祖父＂ ，＂等一下再試試看，孫子＂
"Grandpa, let's stop." "Wait a while and try again, Grandson."

S.FORM: "key! ta "nga! mo ka-zisaw, ananay",
S.PHON: "kəj! ta "ŋa! mo~u ka-ʐiʂaw, ananaj",
S.FORM: "key! ta "nga! mo kazisaw, ananay",
S.PHON: "kəj! ta "ŋa! mo~u kaɻiʂaw, ananaj",
S.TRANSL: ＂快呀！來拔！＂ ＂喔，好痛啊，你要死啦，啊喲喲喲＂
"Quick! Pull it out!" "Ahhh, hell! Owwww, Ahhhhhhh!"

S.FORM: "to rana koan o ya asa ya, ya me-yngen, a ya ma-kteb".
S.PHON: "to~u rana ko~uan o~u ja aʂa ja, ja mə-jŋən, a ja ma-ktəb".
S.FORM: "to rana koan o ya asa ya, ya meyngen, a ya makteb".
S.PHON: "to~u ɻana ko~uan o~u ja aʂa ja, ja məjŋən, a ja maktəb".
S.TRANSL: ＂這一顆就這樣算了啦，你會痛，而我也打不斷它＂
"Let's stop, let's just leave this one because it hurts and I can't break it."

S.FORM: "apia ya, manga apo ko, ta ya ko i-ka-niahey, ta ya ko ji maka-ka-kan, manga apo ko".
S.PHON: "apia ja, maŋa apo~u ko~u, ta ja ko~u i-ka-niaʁəj, ta ja ko~u ʥi maka-ka-kan, maŋa apo~u ko~u".
S.FORM: "apia ya, manga apo ko, ta ya ko ikaniahey, ta ya ko ji makakakan, manga apo ko".
S.PHON: "apia ja, maŋa apo~u ko~u, ta ja ko~u ikaniaɰəj, ta ja ko~u ʥi makakakan, maŋa apo~u ko~u".
S.TRANSL: ＂這怎麼辦呢，孫子? 可是我怕痛呢，它讓我沒辦法好好的吃頓飯
"What can we do, Grandson? I am so afraid of it, and I can't eat."

S.FORM: "a k-om-oan am, tosia an, mo Akay, ta me-yngen an",
S.PHON: "a k-o~um-o~uan am, to~uʂia an, mo~u akaj, ta mə-jŋən an",
S.FORM: "a komoan am, tosia an, mo Akay, ta meyngen an",
S.PHON: "a ko~umo~uan am, to~uɕia an, mo~u akaj, ta məjŋən an",
S.TRANSL: ＂可是有什麼辦法呢，算了吧，祖父，拔了你又痛＂
"I can't do anything, so let's stop, Grandpa. (If I pull it), it will hurt."

S.FORM: "nohon, manga apo ko a, taosia, manga apo ko" koan na no nang am,
S.PHON: "no~uʁo~un, maŋa apo~u ko~u a, tao~uʂia, maŋa apo~u ko~u" ko~uan na no~u naŋ am,
S.FORM: "nohon, manga apo ko a, taosia, manga apo ko" koan na no nang am,
S.PHON: "no~uɰo~un, maŋa apo~u ko~u a, tao~uɕia, maŋa apo~u ko~u" ko~uan na no~u naŋ am,
S.TRANSL: 他說＂好吧，那就算了，不要拔了，孫子＂
"All right, let's give up, Grandson" he said.

S.FORM: pan-pandan na do ka-nge-nge-ngé-ngen na no ngepen na ni akay ta icialaw am do nang am.
S.PHON: pan-panɖan na ɖo~u ka-ŋə-ŋə-ŋ*-ŋən na no~u ŋəpən na ni akaj ta icialaw am ɖo~u naŋ am.
S.FORM: panpandan na do kangengengengen na no ngepen na ni akay ta icialaw am do nang am.
S.PHON: panpanɖan na ɖo~u kaŋəŋəŋəŋən na no~u ŋəpən na ni akaj ta iʨialaw am ɖo~u naŋ am.
S.TRANSL: 那時候祖父真的牙痛的厲害
Grandpa was really going crazy about this tooth.

S.FORM: k-omo-an am, toda a-kteb? a no si ma-kteb am, ka-kcil-an saon?
S.PHON: k-o~umo~u-an am, to~uɖa a-ktəb? a no~u ʂi ma-ktəb am, ka-kcil-an ʂao~un?
S.FORM: komoan am, toda akteb? a no si makteb am, kakcilan saon?
S.PHON: ko~umo~uan am, to~uɖa aktəb? a no~u ɕi maktəb am, kakʨilan ʂao~un?
S.TRANSL: 但有什麼辦法？想打斷它就會斷嗎？就算弄斷了，也是會斷得不整齊
But it wasn't that easy. It isn't possible to say break and have it break. Even if it did, who would know if it only broke in half?

S.FORM: ya ge-getget a, apia o ka-ngerenged na no getget-en i sio am, ori o akma sang am,
S.PHON: ja gə-gətgət a, apia o~u ka-ŋərəŋəɖ na no~u gətgət-ən i ʂio~u am, o~uri o~u akma ʂaŋ am,
S.FORM: ya gegetget a, apia o kangerenged na no getgeten i sio am, ori o akma sang am,
S.PHON: ja gəgətgət a, apia o~u kaŋəɻəŋəɖ na no~u gətgətən i ɕio~u am, o~uɻi o~u akma ʂaŋ am,
S.TRANSL: 不像鋸子鋸得很整齊
It's not like a saw that can cut things straight.

S.FORM: o patok-en am, ji a-skil-i, am ori mina to ko á-mtaj-i nia ji akay ta icialaw ito a.
S.PHON: o~u pato~uk-ən am, ʥi a-ʂkil-i, am o~uri mina to~u ko~u *-mtaʥ-i nia ʥi akaj ta icialaw ito~u a.
S.FORM: o patoken am, ji askili, am ori mina to ko amtaji nia ji akay ta icialaw ito a.
S.PHON: o~u pato~ukən am, ʥi aʂkili, am o~uɻi mina to~u ko~u amtaʥi nia ʥi akaj ta iʨialaw ito~u a.
S.TRANSL: 但是用鎚子鎚斷的會是裂碎的情形；所以就只好作罷，不再拔祖父的牙齒了
Even if I did break the tooth with a hammer, it might have broken unevenly, so I might as well not help him take out the tooth.

S.FORM: "pángap so i-kteb so ngepen ko",
S.PHON: "p*ŋap ʂo~u i-ktəb ʂo~u ŋəpən ko~u",
S.FORM: "pangap so ikteb so ngepen ko",
S.PHON: "paŋap ʂo~u iktəb ʂo~u ŋəpən ko~u",
S.TRANSL: ＂去找一個可以打斷我牙齒的工具來＂
"Go find something that you can use to break my tooth."

S.FORM: ji ko na naway, a kong-koan no ma-cingcing so ngepen,
S.PHON: ʥi ko~u na nawaj, a ko~uŋ-ko~uan no~u ma-ciŋciŋ ʂo~u ŋəpən,
S.FORM: ji ko na naway, a kongkoan no macingcing so ngepen,
S.PHON: ʥi ko~u na nawaj, a ko~uŋko~uan no~u maʨiŋʨiŋ ʂo~u ŋəpən,
S.TRANSL: 句意不詳
(Sentence meaning not clear

S.FORM: am ka-ji ko rana lavi-an saon a ma-rilaw nia am, ka-metdeh no akma-n sito, do ka-ji na maka-ka-kan-an nia am, ori rana saon am.
S.PHON: am ka-ʥi ko~u rana lavi-an ʂao~un a ma-rilaw nia am, ka-mətɖəʁ no~u akma-n ʂito~u, ɖo~u ka-ʥi na maka-ka-kan-an nia am, o~uri rana ʂao~un am.
S.FORM: am kaji ko rana lavian saon a marilaw nia am, kametdeh no akman sito, do kaji na makakakanan nia am, ori rana saon am.
S.PHON: am kaʥi ko~u ɻana lafian ʂao~un a maɻilaw nia am, kamətɖəɰ no~u akman ɕito~u, ɖo~u kaʥi na makakakanan nia am, o~uɻi ɻana ʂao~un am.
S.TRANSL: 看到祖父的情形，讓我很同情的都快要哭了，吃飯的時候像小孩子一樣，沒 辦法好好的吃飯
After seeing my grandfather's condition, I wanted to cry with him. He was like a child who couldn't eat.
